sentence: En el norte el sol pega fuerte todo el día.
ipa: en el noɾte el sol peɣa fweɾte toðo el dia
gloss_en: In the north the sun beats down hard all day.
notes: tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Los pastores llevan las llamas por la quebrada.
ipa: los pastoɾes ʝeban las ʝamas poɾ la kebɾaða
gloss_en: The herders take the llamas through the ravine.
notes: yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Mi abuela prepara calapurca con carne y maíz.
ipa: mi aβwela pɾepaɾa kalapuɾka kon kaɾne i mais
gloss_en: My grandmother makes calapurca with meat and corn.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: El pueblo celebra la fiesta de La Tirana con bailes.
ipa: el pweblo selebɾa la fjesta de la tiɾana kon bajles
gloss_en: The town celebrates the La Tirana feast with dances.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Nosotros subimos al altiplano por el camino viejo.
ipa: nosotɾos suβimos al altiplano poɾ el kamino bjexo
gloss_en: We climb to the altiplano by the old road.
notes: tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: La lluvia del invierno boliviano moja la pampa.
ipa: la ʝubja del inbjeɾno bolibjano moxa la pampa
gloss_en: The Bolivian-winter rain soaks the plain.
notes: yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Ese cerro guarda minerales bajo la tierra seca.
ipa: ese sero ɡaɾda mineɾales baxo la tjera seka
gloss_en: That hill holds minerals beneath the dry earth.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Comimos charqui con papas cocidas al mediodía.
ipa: komimos tʃaɾki kon papas kosiðas al meðjoðia
gloss_en: We ate jerky with boiled potatoes at noon.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: ¿Vos vas a la feria de Arica este domingo?
ipa: bos bas a la feɾja de aɾika este dominɡo
gloss_en: Are you going to the Arica market this Sunday?
notes: cross-word sandhi elision; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: El río Loa cruza el desierto hacia el mar.
ipa: el rio loa kɾusa el desjeɾto asja el maɾ
gloss_en: The Loa river crosses the desert towards the sea.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Los mineros bajan al socavón cada mañana.
ipa: los mineɾos baxan al sokabon kaða maɲana
gloss_en: The miners go down the shaft every morning.
notes: palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: La señora vende hierbas del campo en el mercado.
ipa: la seɲoɾa bende jeɾbas del kampo en el meɾkaðo
gloss_en: The lady sells wild herbs in the market.
notes: palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Hierve el agua para el mate antes del viaje.
ipa: jeɾbe el aɡa paɾa el mate antes del bjaxe
gloss_en: Boil the water for the mate before the journey.
notes: tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: El viento levanta polvo sobre la carretera.
ipa: el bjento lebanta polbo sobɾe la kareteɾa
gloss_en: The wind raises dust over the highway.
notes: tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Mi taita cuenta historias de la mina antigua.
ipa: mi tajta kwenta istoɾjas de la mina antiɡa
gloss_en: My father tells stories of the old mine.
notes: tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Trae la coca y el cigarro para el challa.
ipa: tɾae la koka i el siɣaro paɾa el tʃaʝa
gloss_en: Bring the coca and the cigarette for the challa.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: El zorro anda rondando cerca del corral.
ipa: el soro anda rondando seɾka del koral
gloss_en: The fox is prowling near the pen.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Corre el agua fresca desde la vertiente.
ipa: kore el aɡa fɾeska desde la beɾtjente
gloss_en: Cool water runs from the spring.
notes: tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Teje una manta con lana de vicuña.
ipa: texe una manta kon lana de bikuɲa
gloss_en: She weaves a blanket with vicuña wool.
notes: palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.

sentence: Prende una vela frente a la Virgen del cerro.
ipa: pɾende una bela fɾente a la biɾxen del sero
gloss_en: Light a candle before the Virgin of the hill.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per lipski1994.
